title: Myasthenia gravis - NHS
text:
u have myasthenia gravis, your clinical team will pass information about you on to the National Congenital Anomaly and Rare Disease Registration Service (NCARDRS) .
The NCARDRS helps scientists look for better ways to prevent and treat myasthenia gravis. You can opt out of the register at any time.
Page last reviewed: 13 September 2023
Next review due: 13 September 2026
